case_title: BAQM CLEANING SERVICE VS. RY & RIO PAPI RICO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAQM CLEANING SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED NOV-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RY & RIO PAPI RICO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,650.00 FILED BY BAQM CLEANING SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RY & RIO PAPI RICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-21-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-20-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF BAQM CLEANING SERVICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RY & RIO PAPI RICO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAQM CLEANING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RY & RIO PAPI RICO $4,725.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,815.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
